title: Item.id format change requires touching types + service + repo
prompt:
The codebase uses numeric Item ids today (see src/types.ts, src/service.ts, src/repo.ts). Product wants ids switched to a stable string format `item-N` (e.g., "item-1", "item-2").

The failing target tests in tests/target.test.ts require:
  1. newItem().id is a string
  2. newItem().id matches /^item-\d+$/
  3. findById can resolve newly-created items by their string id

The regression tests in tests/regression.test.ts must continue to pass — buildCart math, priceOf, and findById on programmatic ids must keep working.

You will likely need to touch all three files (src/types.ts, src/service.ts, src/repo.ts) to keep types coherent. Do not modify the tests.
